name: codelens
description: CodeLens workflows for Codex using an existing host-level CodeLens MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Use indexed code evidence and call graphs in Codex
interface.longDescription: Bind Codex to an existing CodeLens MCP server, then use its compact review, graph, diagnostic, and capability workflows without registering another daemon.
defaultPrompt: Use $codelens to map this repository's architecture.
Use $codelens to review my current changes.
